events.event_description: The United States and Kiribati agreed to establish diplomatic relations. The first U.S. envoy was subsequently appointed nonresident, stationed at Suva, Fiji.

evidence.quote: The United States and Kiribati agreed to establish diplomatic relations on August 12, 1980.

events.event_description: William Bodde, Jr. was appointed Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Kiribati, stationed nonresident at Suva, Fiji, as no diplomatic facilities exist on Kiribati.

evidence.quote: William Bodde, Jr. was appointed Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Kiribati on September 26, 1980. Bodde was stationed at Suva, Fiji, as no diplomatic facilities exist on Kiribati.
